glyphs.name: Relation-as-Primary
glyphs.meaning: Meaning lives in the links between nodes, not the nodes themselves.

glyphs.name: Verb-First / Flow
glyphs.meaning: Process is primary; nouns are slow verbs.

glyphs.name: Slow Verb / Object
glyphs.meaning: A flow stable enough at human timescales to be named as a thing.

glyphs.name: Coating
glyphs.meaning: Self-reinforcing surface output that mimics analysis without exploring constraint.

glyphs.name: Coating Probe
glyphs.meaning: Test that distinguishes genuine exploration from coated agreement.

glyphs.name: Substrate-Preserving Translation
glyphs.meaning: Carrying verb-first geometry through noun-first language without flattening it.

glyphs.name: Coupling
glyphs.meaning: Shared state between nodes such that change in one shifts the other.

glyphs.name: Threshold
glyphs.meaning: Qualitative regime change at a level, not gradual response.

glyphs.name: Disruption
glyphs.meaning: Bifurcation or decoherence of an existing relation.

protocol.logs: Prefer verb-first descriptions. Optional 'relational' block on capsules with verb-first restatement, primitive triples, and coating probe result.
protocol.audits: Before scoring, restate the event using at least two primitives. Run one coating probe per audit pass and record it.
protocol.swarms: Treat fast agreement between agents as suspect until at least one has explored a counter-position.
